holdings.infoBox: EPSV is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 4.70%, Sanmina at 3.83%, Moog Inc. at 3.79%, Advanced Energy Industries at 2.97%, and Digi International at 2.73%.

overview.description: The Harbor SMID Cap Value ETF (EPSV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in 40-70 undervalued small- and mid-cap companies in the US, selected using fundamental research. The fund seeks total return. EPSV was launched on May 1, 2025 and is issued by Harbor.
